project_type: React SPA with TypeScript - Doctor Appointment Booking System being upgraded to Clinic OS SaaS
build_system: Vite with npm - standard build, no special quirks
test_framework: No test framework configured - validation via build only
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation and Vite bundling succeeds with no errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access. Node.js v22 available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns: Shadcn UI components, Tailwind CSS, motion animations, React Query for data fetching, React Router for routing.
key_patterns:
- Pages in src/pages/ as default exports
- Components in src/components/ using Shadcn UI from src/components/ui/
- Services in src/services/ using axios with createSecureAxios pattern
- Hooks in src/hooks/ (useAuth, useAdmin, useAxiosSecure, useAxiosPublic)
- AuthContext provides user, isLoading, tokenReady, signOutUser
- AdminRoute component guards admin pages
- PrivateRoute component guards authenticated pages
- motion/react for animations (not framer-motion)
- date-fns for date utilities
- recharts for charts
- lucide-react for icons
- Tailwind theme uses medical-light, medical-medium, medical-dark, cream custom colors
- bg-cream for page backgrounds, Cards for content sections
directory_structure:
src/
  App.tsx - Root component with routing
  pages/ - Page components (Index, Login, Dashboard, DoctorDashboard, etc)
  components/ - Reusable components + ui/ (Shadcn)
  services/ - API service files (api.ts, doctorApi.ts)
  hooks/ - Custom hooks (useAuth, useAdmin, useAxiosSecure, etc)
  data/ - Static data (doctors.ts)
  firebase/ - Firebase config
  images/ - Static images
  utils/ - Utilities (pdfGenerator.ts)
